skills.name: start-mission
skills.description: Start a project's local dev server and the Mission Control dashboard simultaneously.

projects.name: Hierarch
projects.description: React task management app with drag-and-drop, focus timer, and today view
projects.notes: Hierarch is running locally with a redesigned task drawer — now a floating overlay sheet that scales from the top-right, stays open as you browse tasks, and uses a floating X close button to the left. The blank-screen bug (missing DnD context + undestructured onTaskDelete prop) was fixed and the app is on GitHub at github.com/Cougler/Hierarch. Next: continue UX polish or wire up auth/persistence.

projects.name: Kinlo
projects.description: iOS health tracking app for desk workers — workouts, water intake, movement streaks

projects.name: RockPass
projects.notes: Full Phase 1 scaffold is complete and running in Xcode on iPhone 16 Pro simulator. Built 5 screens (Home, Gyms, My Pass, Gear, Account) in Expo Router with a custom elevated center tab bar, Google Maps integration with a live API key restricted to com.rockpass.app, and a 909-line Figma plugin ready to generate all screens in the RockPass Figma file. Next: run the Figma plugin, wire up real gym data via Google Places API, and build the auth layer.

projects.name: hierarch-fos
projects.notes: Just initialized Hierarch FOS — the marketing front-of-site for hierarchical.app. Building a Linear-style structure with sandy/fabric Claude-aesthetic colors. Dev server ready to start.

projects.name: mission-control
projects.description: Claude Code command center — live dashboard tracking projects, skills, MCPs, and session history
projects.notes: Mission Control is fully deployed on Vercel with a live project status card view — each project in ~/Apps gets a card showing its stack, status, and a Claude-written status note sorted by most recent activity. The End Mission flow is wired end-to-end: saying it updates the project's .mc.json, syncs to GitHub, and the hosted dashboard reflects it within seconds.

projects.name: portfolio
projects.notes: Portfolio is live with the contacts upload case study now fully built out — interactive before/after charts, experiment data files recreated, and before/after image comparisons added. Dark/light mode readability is fixed across all pages: Tailwind's static text-foreground classes replaced with dynamic CSS vars, hardcoded white metric card backgrounds converted to glass style, and footer link contrast corrected. Next: finish remaining case study pages (social, brandkit) and add real preview images to personal project cards.

projects.name: showcase
projects.notes: Showcase is live at showcase.aaroncougle.com. 4 slides: Flowki, Hierarch, Plants Are People Too, Adonde. Bento grid layouts, sidebar nav, lightbox expand. Deploy: npx vercel deploy --prod --yes --scope acportfolio from ~/Apps/showcase.

projects.name: website-analyzer
projects.description: Next.js tool for analyzing and auditing websites
